# Quick Fix: AppTextField focusedBorderColor + LoginScreen inline error
Generated: 20260218-020646

## Changes Made

### File 1: `app_text_field.dart`
- Line 14: Added `this.focusedBorderColor,` to constructor
- Line 25: Added `final Color? focusedBorderColor;` field
- Lines 63-68: Updated `focusedBorder` to use `focusedBorderColor ?? Color(0xFFE9EBF1)` with dynamic width (2px when color provided, 1px otherwise)

### File 2: `login_screen.dart`
- Line 32: Added `String? _loginError;` state variable
- `_onKeypadInput()`: Added null-check to clear `_loginError` when user types a digit
- `_handleLogin()`: Replaced `ScaffoldMessenger.showSnackBar` with `setState(() { _loginError = '비밀번호가 일치하지 않습니다'; })`
- Password `AppTextField`: Added `focusedBorderColor: const Color(0xFF2DD1DA)`, removed stale comment
- Below password field: Added conditional `if (_loginError != null)` error text widget

## Verification
- Syntax check: PASS (manual review)
- Pattern followed: existing AppTextField parameter pattern, StatefulWidget setState pattern

## Files Modified
1. `/Users/osy/Desktop/projects/workCheck/attendance_app/lib/presentation/common_widgets/app_text_field.dart` - added focusedBorderColor parameter
2. `/Users/osy/Desktop/projects/workCheck/attendance_app/lib/features/auth/presentation/screens/login_screen.dart` - replaced SnackBar with inline error state

## Notes
- Error clears on the next keypad digit input (inside `_onKeypadInput`)
- `_loginError` is NOT cleared on backspace — only on new digit input, which matches the spec
